summary: A Fox Business 'Varney & Co' segment with DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin discussing Charlotte school absences during ICE operations, with enforcement B-roll inset and a live stock ticker. Standard cable-news interview, not a produced youth-appeal spectacle.
notable_text: NC SCHOOL SUPPORTING ABSENCE DUE TO I.C.E. RAIDS; TRICIA MCLAUGHLIN DHS ASSISTANT SECRETARY FOR PUBLIC AFFAIRS; VARNEY & CO; FOX BUSINESS
